stages.intendedOutput: Persisted project snapshot, registered source identity and ownership
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: ProjectSummary plus a new RegisteredChannelSet and cloned encoded-byte map per unique source-set/patch domain
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: ProjectStore::summary is repeatedly polled for cancellation; source bytes are cloned/read again per domain

stages.intendedOutput: PreparedChannelSet with oriented, normalized, registered channel pyramids
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: PreparedChannelSet capped to a 2048-pixel level-zero edge and five levels
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact object is passed to Stage 3, but it is decoded again for each patch/full-source domain and every preview run; computed cache key is not backed by a runtime cache here

stages.intendedOutput: PreparedExemplar with registered rectification and a shared correspondence field
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Authoritative PreparedExemplar for full frame or authored four-point patch
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact object is passed; PreparedExemplarCache owned by ProjectSession is not used by this route

stages.intendedOutput: Prepared de-lit exemplar retaining Stage 3 lineage
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Stage 4 exemplar; often a pass-through when delighting is off
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact object is passed, but no cross-preview cache is supplied

stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Fresh SourceAnalysisReport with persisted routing intent overlaid
stages.downstreamConsumer: Stages 6 and 8; Stage 11 evidence; Stage 12 scoring context; Stage 13 behavior
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact report is consumed, but ProjectSession.source_analysis_cache is bypassed

stages.downstreamConsumer: Stage 7, Stage 8, Stage 10 footprints, Stage 11 evidence and Stage 12 measurements
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact report is consumed, but ProjectSession.scale_orientation_cache is bypassed

stages.intendedOutput: FeatureFieldReport with saliency, stationarity, structure, seamability and usability
stages.downstreamConsumer: Stage 8 router; sampled evidence in Stages 11 and 12
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact report is passed, but average_field/perimeter_field rescan candidate rectangles repeatedly and no feature cache is retained across previews

stages.intendedOutput: PreparedMaterialDomain whose route and pixels satisfy source evidence
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: A fresh empty MaterialDomainCache is created per domain. Stage 11 can later select TextureSynthesis even when this domain is DirectSource, and Stage 14 does not execute synthesis for that mismatch

stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Exact persisted template snapshot compiled at requested final output size
stages.downstreamConsumer: Stage 10 destinations, Stage 14 output dimensions, 14P atlas rectangles
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact topology is passed into 14P; UI overlays are separately reconstructed by legacy resolve_compile_plan after compilation

stages.intendedOutput: ResolvedSlotDemandSet with physical footprint, allowed sampling modes, profile/effect capacity
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: ResolvedSlotDemandSet for all Stage 9 allocation rectangles; requested_features is always empty
stages.downstreamConsumer: Stage 11 and construction of Stage 13 inputs
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Demand identity is not carried as an ID/hash. Profile type and weathering class are recorded but never compile an EffectPlan or render effects

stages.intendedOutput: CropCandidate set for each exact slot demand
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: CandidateSet generated inside an authored crop window, then mutated/filtered by apply_authored_mapping
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: The exact post-filter object reaches Stage 12. However new documents seed template-atlas source crops, and TextureSynthesis candidates bypass crop-window enforcement because crop is None

stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Top 16 candidates per slot scored from Stage 7 measurements
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact top-K object is passed. Field statistics are recomputed by scanning each candidate crop

stages.intendedOutput: PlacementPlan containing one validated SamplingPlan per slot
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact plan is consumed. Reuse defaults permit stochastic/manufactured reuse; measured first repeated slots selected crop-less TextureSynthesis candidates

stages.intendedOutput: SynthesizedSlotMaterial with shared correspondence, validity and registered channels
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: One allocation-sized rendered slot per topology slot, sampled serially
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Exact object is passed. TextureSynthesis has no explicit map_position branch and falls through to generic centered sampling while diagnostics still report TextureSynthesis executed

stages.intendedOutput: Non-exportable intermediate atlas assembled from Stage 14 slots
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Only channel roles present in every required slot; Base Color is mandatory; correspondence and validity remain native-only
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Region ID is not generated; correspondence/validity/diagnostics/algorithm versions are discarded at IPC; slot-result identity hashes reread every pixel

stages.intendedOutput: Hotspot-local height_f32 and tangent normal RGBA
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: No output on Stage 14P; implementation exists in render-core and is used only by dead/disabled compositors and tests
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Bypassed; imported Height/Normal may be sampled, but generated structural maps are not composed

stages.actualRuntimeOutput: No EffectPlan compiler; only Stage 10 capacity metadata and an EffectPlanHeader type exist
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Stages 15, 16 and 18 return unsupported; effect count in measured run is zero

stages.intendedOutput: Base Color, Height, Normal, Roughness, Metallic, AO, Region ID and Material ID atlases
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: Stage 14P emits imported common material channels only; measured run emitted Base Color only
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: Generated maps and Region ID are bypassed. Old complete compositor exists but is unused

stages.intendedOutput: PBR preview consuming one compiled artifact and authoritative UV/slot metadata
stages.actualRuntimeOutput: A data-URL HTML img plus HTML region overlays
stages.ignoredOrRecomputed: No mesh, UV islands, GPU preview renderer, PBR binding or progressive preview. UI region metadata is separately resolved and zipped by order
